message:
fix: deep audit round 2 — sandbox, mesh, protocol hardening

fcp-sandbox:
- Reject zero memory_mb, wall_clock_timeout_ms, cpu_percent in
  CompiledPolicy::from_manifest() — zero limits make execution
  impossible and could mask misconfigurations silently
- Reject cpu_percent > 100 (invalid percentage)
- Updated tests to expect errors for zero-value configs

fcp-mesh:
- Cap XOR filter vector growth to declared bit_capacity/64 words
  to prevent memory exhaustion via crafted gossip hashes
- Cap IBLT byte budget to 16MB maximum to prevent usize::MAX
  allocation via saturating_mul overflow
- Fix degraded.rs compile error from SignedFcpsFrame::new Result

fcp-protocol:
- Replace debug_assert_eq with runtime FrameError::LengthMismatch
  check in FcpsFrame::encode() — payload length mismatch was only
  caught in debug builds
- Add FrameError::InvalidFlags variant and validate mutually
  exclusive flag combinations: ERROR+RESPONSE rejected,
  STREAM_END requires STREAMING

Tests: sandbox 536, mesh 1064, protocol 448 all pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
